name: Card Scanner
desc: Once per turn: You can declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap); both players reveal the bottom card of their Decks, and if it was the declared card type, they add it to their hand. Otherwise, they place it on top of their Deck. If this face-up card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can make your opponent place 1 card from their hand on the bottom of the Deck.
eff: Once per turn: You can declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap); both players reveal the bottom card of their Decks, and if it was the declared card type, they add it to their hand. Otherwise, they place it on top of their Deck. If this face-up card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can make your opponent place 1 card from their hand on the bottom of the Deck.

action: Reveals from the bottom of the player's Deck
Reveals from the bottom of your opponent's Deck
Places cards from the Deck on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
Activates if destroyed by card effect
Places cards from the opponent's hand on the bottom of the Deck
